allow: Bash(psql shayn_mis -c "SELECT rolname FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'shayn_user';")
Bash(psql shayn_mis -c "CREATE USER shayn_user WITH PASSWORD 'password';")
Bash(psql shayn_mis -c "GRANT ALL ON DATABASE shayn_mis TO shayn_user;")
Bash(psql shayn_mis -c "GRANT ALL ON SCHEMA public TO shayn_user;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\), MAX\(average_rating\), MAX\(reviews_count\) FROM judgeme_products;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "SELECT product_id, title, average_rating, reviews_count FROM judgeme_products WHERE reviews_count > 0 ORDER BY average_rating DESC, reviews_count DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "SELECT product_id, rating FROM judgeme_reviews LIMIT 3;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "SELECT product_id, external_id, title FROM judgeme_products LIMIT 3;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM judgeme_reviews WHERE product_id IS NOT NULL;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "SELECT p.title, ROUND\(AVG\(r.rating\)::numeric,2\) AS avg, COUNT\(r.review_id\) AS cnt FROM judgeme_products p JOIN judgeme_reviews r ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.published GROUP BY p.title ORDER BY avg DESC, cnt DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "ALTER TABLE judgeme_reviews ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS product_external_id TEXT; ALTER TABLE judgeme_reviews ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS product_handle TEXT;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM judgeme_reviews WHERE product_external_id IS NOT NULL;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "SELECT p.title, ROUND\(AVG\(r.rating\)::numeric,2\) AS avg, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM judgeme_products p JOIN judgeme_reviews r ON r.product_external_id = p.external_id WHERE r.published GROUP BY p.title ORDER BY avg DESC, cnt DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=mihil psql -U shayn_user -d shayn_mis -c "SELECT review_id, created_at, has_photos FROM judgeme_reviews WHERE published = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;")
